goal: Complete T0601-T0608 with property and fuzz tests, private-first fault tests, input and supply-chain red teams, Codex model boundaries, independent different-model review, L3 streaming load and every mandatory chaos and Kill Criterion drill without exercising protected production authority.
scope: unit, property, fuzz and contract coverage for canonical MIME, schemas, redaction, idempotency and endpoint guards
synthetic private-first, remote recovery, M3 and one-live-asset fault injection
prompt, path, Unicode, CSV formula, PDF active content, macro, archive expansion and egress red team
OAuth surface, GitHub App scope, Secret handling, immutable Action, dependency, log and ephemeral plaintext red team
Codex development and public-health-only Auto System Card plus deterministic policy evals
two independent reviews using different model families
100000-message and 200000-attachment streaming load, 500-page Gmail boundary, concurrency and capacity policies
all CH-01 through CH-18 and KILL-001 through KILL-010 synthetic drills
local synthetic Stage 6 evidence and two no-Secret CI definitions
non_goals: real Gmail authorization, message access or mutation
real private repository lookup, write, release mutation, decrypt or recovery
reading or delivering production age identities, GitHub credentials, Gmail credentials or PDF passwords
enabling, dispatching or deploying the protected production workflow
claiming schedule timeliness, successful remote execution, protected load or SLA
Moomoo Portal access, download, scraping or automation
thread-level Trash, permanent Gmail deletion or any non-source mutation
model access to real email, attachment, private object or Secret data
protected_oracles: real Gmail 429, 5xx, History expiry, pagination interruption and exact-message mutation recovery
real private repository conflict, push failure, ciphertext corruption and capacity observation
real age identity and protected PDF password failure and recovery
real GitHub Release delete, upload, uncertain response and repair
real GitHub-hosted Stage 6 software and model assurance workflows
real 04:30 Australia/Sydney schedule miss and Sunday compensation
real quarterly Kill Criterion and Recovery Key drills
AC-003, AC-007, AC-013, AC-014, AC-016, AC-018 through AC-022, AC-024 through AC-028 and AC-031 through AC-033 final oracles
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 6 commit; Stage 5 remains at its pinned verified commit and no remote state has changed.
stop_conditions: frozen Stage 0 manifest or cumulative Stage 5 gate drifts
real or sensitive sender, account, amount, credential, key or repository data enters the publishable tree
a test passes by checking a marker rather than exercising its claimed mechanism and oracle
unknown LFS plan or capacity is treated as write authority
a model port can observe real email, attachment, private object or Secret bytes
a thread, permanent-delete or non-source Gmail endpoint becomes reachable
a protected oracle requires mailbox, private-repository, credential, environment or remote-write authority
Stage 7 behavior is required to make a Stage 6 local gate pass
